name: PayGate
description: PayGate is a Togolese payment gateway for collecting mobile money payments and disbursing funds via Mixx Togo (T-Money) and Moov (Flooz). API documentation is private and only accessible to authenticated merchants from their PayGate dashboard.
example_prompt: Add PayGate to my Togolese app so I can collect mobile money payments via T-Money and Flooz, and disburse funds to mobile money numbers.
